title: Prohibition of the manufacture, sale or distribution of the Astemizole and Terfinadine for human_Section

HWlfMel 2. ^tpHISIsHl" [Tpr, ^OT3^RT-H014/7/2002-^,HU,« lis H l ^ H l 679 GF2G03 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PARTII—Sac. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 5th March, 2003 G.S.R 191(E).—Whereas the Central Government is satisfied that the use of drug formulations containing Astemizole and/or Terfmadine arc likely to involve certain risks and whereas safer alternatives to these drugs are available. And whereas the Central Government is satisfied that it is necessary and expedient to prohibit the manufacture, sale and distribution of these drugs in public interest Now, therefore, in exercise of powers conferred by Section 26-A of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the Notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Health and Family Ufelfare number G.S.R 732(E) dated 29th October, 2002, namely :— In the sa id notification, in the thi rd para, for the words and figures " prohibits the manufacture, sale and distribution of the following drugs for human use with effect from 1st August, 2003 :— 1. Astemizole 2. Terfinadinc", the following words and figures shall be substituted, nameiy :— "Prohibits the manufacture of the following drugs for human use with immediate effect and sale and distribution thereof with effect from 1st April 2003, namely — 1. Astemizole 2. Terfmadine." [F. No. X-11014/7/2002-DMS & PFA] DEEPAK GUPTA, Jt. Secy.
